Reason_for_Visit.summary: Initial visit for newly diagnosed early stage breast cancer, specifically a clinical stage I HR+/HER2- grade 1 IDC of the right breast, to discuss treatment options and establish care.

Lab_Results.lab_summary: Hemoglobin 15.3, Hematocrit 48.8, Platelet Count 217, Sodium 145, Potassium 4.0, Chloride 109, Carbon Dioxide 26, Urea Nitrogen 15, Creatinine 1.02, Glucose 72, Calcium 10.0, AST 37, Alanine transaminase 49, Alkaline Phosphatase 67, Bilirubin 0.7, Albumin 3.9

Clinical_Findings.findings: MRI-guided core biopsy: 0.8 cm grade 1 IDC with ER+ 99%, PR+ 95%, HER2- (IHC 0; FISH ratio 1.1), HER3- 3-4%, no lymphovascular invasion, no DCIS. Right lumpectomy: 0.9 cm grade 1 IDC, no lymphovascular invasion, margins negative, no DCIS, 0/3 LN+

Current_Medications.current_meds: acetaminophen (TYLENOL) 500 mg tablet, amLODIPine (NORVASC) 5 mg tablet, artificial tears (TEARS RENEWED) ophthalmic solution, ascorbic acid, vitamin C, (VITAMIN C) 1,000 mg tablet, baclofen (LIORESAL) 10 mg tablet, BARIATRIC MULTIVITAMINS 45 mg iron- 800 mcg-120 mcg capsule, biotin 10,000 mcg CAP, busPIRone (BUSPAR) 30 mg tablet, calcium citrate-vitamin D 315 mg-5 mcg (200 unit) tablet, diclofenac (VOLTAREN) 1 % gel, docusate sodium (COLACE) 100 mg capsule, DULoxetine (CYMBALTA) 60 mg DR, ELDERBERRY, fluticasone propionate (FLONASE) 50 mcg/actuation nasal spray, gabapentin (NEURONTIN) 300 mg capsule, lamoTRIgine (LAMICTAL) 200 mg tablet, lamoTRIgine (LAMICTAL) 25 mg tablet, LORazepam (ATIVAN) 0.5 mg tablet, losartan (COZAAR) 50 mg tablet, lurasidone (LATUDA) 80 mg tablet, omeprazole (PRILOSEC) 20 mg capsule, prazosin (MINIPRESS) 1 mg capsule, pregabalin (*****) 75 mg capsule, rosuvastatin (CRESTOR) 20 mg tablet, TURMERIC ORAL, UNABLE TO FIND 1,500 mg daily after dinner, zinc gluconate 50 mg tablet

Treatment_Goals.response_assessment: Not yet on treatment — no response to assess.
Treatment_Goals.current_meds: acetaminophen, amLODIPine, artificial tears, ascorbic acid, baclofen, BARIATRIC MULTIVITAMINS, biotin, busPIRone, calcium citrate-vitamin D, diclofenac, docusate sodium, DULoxetine, ELDERBERRY, fluticasone propionate, gabapentin, lamoTRIgine, LORazepam, losartan, lurasidone, omeprazole, prazosin, pregabalin, rosuvastatin, TURMERIC, UNABLE TO FIND, zinc gluconate

Response_Assessment.response_assessment: The patient has a 0.9 cm grade 1 IDC with ER+ 99%, PR+ 95%, HER2- (IHC 0; FISH ratio 1.1), HER3- 3-4%, no HER4, no DCIS. The mass is stable on imaging.

hormonal therapy.summary: 5 years of anti-estrogen therapy with an aromatase inhibitor

bone therapy.summary: calcium and vitamin D to improve bone health

Medication_Plan.medication_plan: an aromatase inhibitor, calcium, and vitamin D
Medication_Plan.response_assessment: Not yet on treatment — no response to assess.
Medication_Plan.current_meds: Not yet on treatment — no current medications listed

Therapy_plan.therapy_plan: 5 years of anti-estrogen therapy with an aromatase inhibitor, proceed with radiation oncology consultation, obtain DEXA, calcium/vitamin D, aim to resume daily aerobic activities

Procedure_Plan.procedure_plan: proceed with radiation oncology consultation; she will have radiation

Genetic_Testing_Plan.genetic_testing_plan: Not yet on treatment — no response to assess.

follow_up_next_visit.Next clinic visit: RTC after radiation course is completed
